data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidations on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $2,192, the cumulative liquidation of short positions on these exchanges could reach $778 million. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $1,987, the liquidation of long positions could amount to $133 million.

data.title: Pump.fun has repurchased over 30% of its total circulating supply of tokens, with a cumulative repurchase value exceeding $335 million.
data.description: According to data from fees.pump.fun, Pump.fun spent 10,705.5 SOL (approximately $962,000) yesterday to buy back 511.7 million PUMP tokens. Since starting the PUMP token buyback on July 15, the cumulative number of PUMP tokens bought back has reached 107,892,506,947, worth approximately $335,199,973, reducing the total circulating supply by 30.478%.

data.title: Iranian media: Attacks on energy facilities would damage all U.S. energy infrastructure in the region.
data.description: According to Iranian media, the Joint Operations Command of the Iranian Armed Forces stated that all US energy infrastructure in the region would be targeted should Iran's fuel and energy infrastructure be attacked. (Jinshi)

data.title: Musk: Project Terafab is about to be announced, with an annual capacity of over 1 terawatt of computing power.
data.description: Elon Musk announced on the SpaceX platform that SpaceX and Tesla will jointly unveil the TERAFAB project at approximately 8 PM Central Time today (9 AM Beijing Time tomorrow), and will broadcast it live on the SpaceX platform. The project aims to achieve more than 1 terawatt of computing power annually (covering logic chips, memory chips, and packaging), with approximately 80% used in the space sector and approximately 20% used for ground applications.

data.title: Incident Reported Near UAE Waters: Unidentified Projectile Explodes Close to Cargo Ship
data.description: The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) has received a report of an incident occurring 15 nautical miles north of Sharjah, United Arab Emirates. According to Jin10, the captain of a cargo vessel reported that an unidentified projectile exploded in close proximity to the ship. All crew members have been reported safe.

data.title: UK Nuclear Submarine Arrives in Arabian Sea, Military Sources Confirm
data.description: A UK Royal Navy nuclear-powered submarine has arrived in the Arabian Sea, according to military sources cited by British authorities on the evening of March 21. According to Jin10, the submarine is equipped with the capability to launch cruise missiles. This development comes amid heightened geopolitical tensions in the region. The presence of the submarine underscores the UK's strategic military interests and its commitment to maintaining security in the area.

data.title: xAI plans to launch a computer-controlled intelligent agent; Musk confirms the upcoming release of "Grok Computer".
data.description: X platform users discovered a feature switch named `enable_grok_computer` in the Grok web page source code, speculating that xAI is preparing to launch a computer-controlled intelligent agent, essentially a "trial version" of the previously announced Macrohard project. Elon Musk confirmed this in a retweet post, stating "Coming out soon." Macrohard is an AI automation system jointly developed by Tesla and xAI, using Grok as its high-level inference engine, coupled with an AI agent to process screen input and keyboard/mouse actions in real time. Previous reports indicated that data collection for the project was suspended last month.

data.title: A mysterious whale withdrew 4.29 million USDT from Aave and then bought 2012 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a mysterious whale withdrew 4.29 million USDT from Aave and then bought 2,012 ETH. This whale currently holds 119,826 ETH, worth $248.98 million, and also holds 4.35 million USDT in Aave.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Futures Liquidations Surge to $277 Million in 24 Hours
data.description: Major cryptocurrency exchanges experienced significant futures liquidations, amounting to approximately $242 million in the past hour. According to NS3.AI, the total liquidations over the past 24 hours reached around $277 million. This surge in liquidations highlights the volatility and risk present in the cryptocurrency markets.

data.title: Trump demands Iran open the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to destroy power plants.
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump posted on social media on the 21st that if Iran does not fully open the Strait of Hormuz without any threats within 48 hours, the United States will strike and destroy all of its power plants. (Xinhua)

data.title: Brother Machi's Ethereum long positions have all been liquidated, leaving his account with only $158,000 remaining.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, due to the recent sharp decline in the crypto market, Huang Licheng's (aka "Machi Dage") long position in Ethereum, holding 5,250 ETH, was completely liquidated, worth approximately $11.06 million. Machi Dage's total losses have reached $30.22 million, leaving his account with only $158,000 remaining.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below 70,000 USDT Amid Daily Decline
data.description: Bitcoin has dropped below 70,000 USDT, currently trading at 69,977.33 USDT. According to Foresight News, this marks a daily decrease of 0.74%.

data.title: Volkswagen CEO Commits to Ongoing Restructuring Amid Rising Orders
data.description: Volkswagen AG's CEO has affirmed that the restructuring efforts at Europe's largest automaker will persist, despite an increase in order backlog. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's commitment to its strategic overhaul. The CEO emphasized that the restructuring is crucial for Volkswagen's long-term success and competitiveness in the automotive industry. The automaker is focused on enhancing efficiency and adapting to market changes, ensuring it remains a leader in the sector. The ongoing process aims to streamline operations and improve overall performance, aligning with the company's future goals.

data.title: Understanding Portfolio Stress Testing for Investors
data.description: Portfolio stress testing using historical data can be a valuable tool for investors, particularly in navigating market uncertainties. FactSet posted on X, highlighting the importance of stress testing frameworks that can aid investment professionals in assessing potential risks and making informed decisions. By analyzing past market events, investors can better prepare for future volatility and enhance their investment strategies. This approach allows for a comprehensive evaluation of how different scenarios might impact a portfolio, ultimately supporting more resilient financial planning.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from Wintermute to Anonymous Address
data.description: At 06:29, a total of 36.66 BTC was transferred from Wintermute, according to ChainCatcher. Of this amount, 32.9 BTC was sent to an anonymous address starting with bc1puad9t, while 2.9999 BTC was transferred to another address belonging to Wintermute.
